summary: Backend API testing for Precision ERP completed. 32/32 tests passed across auth, CRM, inventory (incl. AI bill scan), BOM, work-orders, job-cards, quotations, POs, invoices (intra/inter-state GST), QC reports, documents+revisions, expenses+GST report, HR, marketing, public portal, and dashboard.

minor.issue: in_process movement decrements qty_on_hand AND increments qty_in_process; if API consumer also calls an 'out' movement before in_process, stock could be double-decremented. Confirm intended semantics.
customer_type flips to 'repeat' when orders_count>=2 but never reverts on WO delete (counter not decremented). Minor data-integrity concern.
DELETE allowed for any authenticated user (no role restriction). Other resources restrict to admin/manager - inconsistent authz.
Stores email lowercased but EmailStr in Pydantic doesn't enforce; ok. No password strength check.

action_items: Review minor authz inconsistencies (leads/suppliers/campaigns/job-cards DELETE permissions).
Consider decrementing customer orders_count when a WorkOrder is deleted, and re-evaluating customer_type.
Add password strength validation in /api/auth/register if needed.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 1037 lines - consider splitting into routers/models modules for maintainability (>700 line threshold).
logger is defined AFTER scan_bill which calls logger.exception; works at runtime (module-level) but is brittle - move logging.basicConfig + logger to top of file.
JWT_SECRET falls back to 'dev-secret' if env var missing - acceptable for dev but ensure prod sets it; consider failing fast if unset in production.
All endpoints async, use Pydantic, proper HTTPException codes - good.
AI scan endpoint catches LLM errors and returns 500 with message - acceptable, but could distinguish between LLM errors (502) and code errors (500).
seed_data_creation: Tests created TEST_-prefixed customers, leads, suppliers, inventory items, BOM, work orders, job cards, quotation, PO, invoices (intra+inter), QC report, document, expense, employee, attendance, campaign. Most cleaned up; some persist for traceability (customers/WOs/quotes/POs/invoices/QC/BOM).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend fully validated. Tests are idempotent (use unique TEST_ prefixes + timestamps). AI bill scan endpoint passes - real Claude call succeeded with a minimal PNG. If frontend needs testing next, public URL is https://machineflow-hub.preview.emergentagent.com and admin creds work.
rca of the issue: No bugs found - all listed P0/P1 features verified end-to-end.
